race.description: Real Punters Play Here Tabtouch Mdn
race.comment: PARTAY (4) returns for Grant & Alana and gets the key booking of Pike. Showed good signs in his debut prep and looks up to the mark following a trial win at Lark Hill. Rates on top and is a great chance to break through. LEMMOR FILOU (10) is by the sire Rommel and from the stakes-winning mare Flying Affair. Chris Parnham takes the ride after the pair partnered successfully in a recent trial. MAURICE'S PRINCESS (7) looks next best of the race bunched and resumes from a spell of seven months. Couldn't keep up with them when thrown in the deep end in the LR Belgravia Stakes at Ascot but this is much easier and her trials in readiness suggest she's come back in good order. Anticipating a bright return. WESTERN MISS (12) is a three-year-old filly by Ghaiyyath on debut for the Grantham stable. Has a Lark Hill trial placing to her credit. Keep a close eye out for a positive market move.
